data.title: AI diagnostics in point-of-care infectious disease valued at $53B in 2024, expected to double by 2033, reducing hospital costs.
data.description: Ventripoint Diagnostics Ltd., based in Vancouver, BC, announced on Dec. 12, 2025, that the point-of-care infectious disease diagnostics market, with a value of $53 billion in 2024, is expected to almost double by 2033. This growth is attributed to AI systems that enhance diagnostic processes.

data.title: Mohammed Ben Sulayem re-elected as FIA President for a second four-year term after General Assembly election in Tashkent.
data.description: In Paris, it has been officially announced that Mohammed Ben Sulayem has been re-elected as the President of the Fédération Internationale de l’Automobile (FIA), the worldwide governing body for motor sport and mobility organizations. This decision came after his Presidential List was elected by the General Assembly in Tashkent, Uzbekistan. This marks the beginning of Mohammed Ben Sulayem's second four-year term. During his tenure, he has been credited with overseeing a period of notable revitalization and stability within the organization.

data.title: TRWD plans to grow adult entertainment sector with multi-venue strategy, emphasizing revenue momentum.
data.description: TRWD has reported impressive revenue growth and revealed its strategy to dominate the adult entertainment sector by expanding into multiple venues. The company aims to consolidate the industry by implementing a scalable approach, with a focus on sustained growth and profitability. This move comes as TRWD sees continued success, with revenue increasing by a significant percentage. The company's plan includes targeting specific markets and utilizing various venues to capture a larger share of the adult entertainment market.

data.title: Coinbase to introduce prediction markets and tokenized stocks, set to announce next week. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: Coinbase has recently entered the prediction markets arena, becoming the newest crypto exchange to do so. They are set to unveil tokenized stocks in the upcoming week. This development marks a significant move for Coinbase as they expand their services to include these new offerings. The platform's decision to delve into prediction markets and tokenized stocks showcases their ambition to diversify and attract more users. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting launch by Coinbase.

data.title: Donald Trump boosts marijuana stocks before market open, poised to loosen restrictions - Investors Business Daily.
data.description: Before the opening of the stock market on Friday, there was a rally in marijuana stocks initiated by Donald Trump. This was due to reports suggesting that he may be looking to relax federal regulations on marijuana. The news lifted several marijuana stocks, creating a positive impact on the market.

data.title: Dow rises over 100 points; Lululemon beats Q3 earnings. Dow at 48,819.22 (+0.24%), NASDAQ at 23,514.76 (-0.34%), S&P 500 at 6,892.15 (-0.13%).
data.description: This morning, U.S. stocks showed mixed performance, with the Dow Jones index increasing by over 100 points on Friday. The Dow rose by 0.24% to 48,819.22, while the NASDAQ declined by 0.34% to 23,514.76. The S&P 500 also fell by 0.13% to 6,892.15. Within sectors, materials shares experienced a 0.9% increase, while information technology stocks dropped by 0.9%. Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) reported strong third-quarter results, surpassing analyst expectations. They posted earnings of $2.59 per share, beating estimates by 14.15%, and revenue of $2.57 billion exceeded projections. For further details, refer to a full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Boston Public Schools partners with Cartwheel & BCCMH to provide mental health support to students, families, and staff.
data.description: A groundbreaking collaboration has been established between Cartwheel, The Brookline Center for Community Mental Health (BCCMH), and Boston Public Schools to provide prompt and multilingual mental health support for students, families, caregivers, and educators. This partnership, announced in Boston on December 12, 2025, aims to enhance mental health services within the school system, catering to the diverse needs of the community.

data.title: Unstructured secures FedRAMP High authorization, providing AI-ready data to US agencies & industry partners.
data.description: Unstructured, a leading AI-ready data orchestration company based in Sacramento, California, has recently obtained FedRAMP High authorization. This significant achievement highlights Unstructured's dedication to providing secure, scalable, and mission-ready services to US government agencies and industry partners. Their solutions cater to entities with strict data security and compliance mandates. Following this authorization, Unstructured joins a select group of AI infrastructure firms with the approval to support government operations.

data.title: Ciena (NYSE: CIEN) beats Q4 expectations with 20.3% revenue growth to $1.35B, EPS of 91 cents. Q1 revenue guidance $1.35B-$1.43B. FY 2026 revenue expected $5.70B-$6.10B.
data.description: Ciena Corp (NYSE: CIEN) exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter results, reporting a 20.3% year-on-year increase in revenue to $1.35 billion, surpassing the estimated $1.29 billion. The company also beat analyst predictions with an adjusted EPS of 91 cents, above the expected 77 cents. For the first quarter, Ciena anticipates revenue between $1.350 billion and $1.430 billion, higher than the analyst consensus of $1.252 billion, with an adjusted gross margin forecasted at 43%-44%. Looking ahead to fiscal year 2026, the company expects revenue in the range of $5.70 billion to $6.10 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $4.71 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: LHV Group acquired own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from 05.-11.12.2025.
data.description: LHV Group has disclosed that it purchased its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange between 05 and 11 December 2025. The exact number of shares acquired during this period has not been specified in the announcement.
